francophone.excerpt: Les deux pays pourraient reprendre les négociations cette semaine malgré le blocus des ports iraniens dans le détroit d’Ormuz, bien que l’Iran menace de violer le cessez-le-feu si le blocage américain...

francophone.title: Dérapages, rejets, report... Retour en quatre actes sur l'affaire du concert de Kanye West au Vélodrome de Marseille
francophone.excerpt: Kanye West annonce finalement sur ses réseaux le report de son concert, prévu le 11 juin au stade Vélodrome. La venue du rappeur américain a été vivement controversée et les politiques réclamaient son...

francophone.title: Sibyle Veil, ondes de choc
francophone.excerpt: A la tête de Radio France depuis sept ans, l’énarque, formée à l’Elysée sous Sarkozy, a su résister aux crises et aux polémiques.

francophone.title: Au zoo de Madrid, naissance d’un orang-outan de Bornéo, une espèce «en danger critique d’extinction»
francophone.excerpt: Le petit mâle d’1,5 kilo est né le 2 avril dans le parc où vit sa mère. Menacée, l’espèce ne vit à l’état sauvage que sur l’île indonésienne de Sumatra et sur l’île de Bornéo.

francophone.excerpt: Quand une pétition dépasse le seuil de 500 000 signatures, un débat devient possible dans l’hémicycle, si cette instance l’approuve. Mais les députés de la commission ont voté à 30 voix pour le classe...

francophone.title: La pétition contre la loi Yadan ne sera pas débattue à l’Assemblée nationale, malgré plus de 700 000 signatures
francophone.excerpt: La commission des lois a voté mercredi pour son classement, estimant qu’un débat sur le sujet se télescoperait avec l’examen du texte sur l’antisémitisme prévu à partir de jeudi.

francophone.excerpt: Les distributeurs ont proposé au Premier ministre, dans une lettre envoyée mardi, de suspendre "temporairement" la collecte de cette taxe, ce qui permettrait de faire baisser "de 15 centimes" le prix...

francophone.title: La plateforme de formation en ligne de la police nationale victime d'un piratage informatique
francophone.excerpt: Baptisée e-campus, cette plateforme gérée par une société extérieure a été piratée les 17 et 18 mars.

anglophone.title: Four killed in second Turkish school shooting in two days

anglophone.title: Trump administration moves to erase Jan. 6 riot convictions for seditious conspiracy
anglophone.excerpt: The Trump administration is moving to vacate the seditious conspiracy convictions of extremists involved in the Jan. 6, 2021 attack, who earlier received commutations instead of full pardons.

anglophone.title: South Africa names apartheid-era politician as new ambassador to the US
anglophone.excerpt: Roelf Meyer played a key role as a negotiator during talks to end white-minority rule in South Africa.

anglophone.title: Trump says new talks with Iran will happen soon. And, Eric Swalwell faces new allegations
anglophone.excerpt: President Trump says new talks with Iran could happen in the next two days. And, Democrat Eric Swalwell faces new allegations as a second woman comes forward accusing him of rape.

anglophone.title: Trump's rift with Pope is playing out in public - it's costing him valuable support

anglophone.title: Trump says peace talks could resume in days as U.S. military blocks Iranian ports
anglophone.excerpt: President Trump said a second round of direct U.S.-Iran peace talks could resume in Pakistan within the next two days, even as he instituted a naval blockade of all Iranian ports.

anglophone.title: Fela Kuti is the first African artist to enter the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame
anglophone.excerpt: In December, the late Nigerian superstar became the first African musician to get a Grammy lifetime achievement award. Now he's making history as well at the Rock & Roll Hall of Fame.

anglophone.title: Sri Lanka repatriates 238 Iranian sailors stranded after US torpedo attack
anglophone.excerpt: The survivors of the US attack on Iranian vessel Iris Dena, which claimed the lives of 104 people, were among those sent home.

anglophone.title: Tax season was supposed to bring big refunds. So far they're less than expected
anglophone.excerpt: The average refund so far is $350 more than last year at this time, despite projections that it would be closer to $1,000 due to Republican-led tax changes as part of the Big Beautiful Bill Act.

anglophone.title: Pope heads to Cameroon as separatists announce 3-day pause in fighting
anglophone.excerpt: Pope Leo XIV is heading to the central African nation of Cameroon with a message of peace for its separatist region and for talks with President Paul Biya.

anglophone.title: No one likes being discombobulated. How did the feeling get such a fun name?
anglophone.excerpt: Sometimes you just need to recombobulate. That word isn't in the dictionary, but it is on a beloved sign at Milwaukee's airport.

anglophone.title: 'No peace': Nearly a year after her son's death, she learned that ICE was responsible
anglophone.excerpt: Ruben Ray Martinez is considered the first person to be killed by ICE during President Trump's second term. His mother believes his death could have been avoided.

anglophone.title: They counted on a rural dialysis unit to keep them alive. Then it closed
anglophone.excerpt: A hospital in Nebraska shut down the only dialysis unit for miles, upending lives. That's despite a new federal program that gave the state more than $200 million to improve rural health care access.
